KanbanBoard.description: Drag-and-drop kanban board with columns and cards, project-scoped

MarkdownEditor.description: CodeMirror 6 markdown editor for notes and todos, project-scoped

KanbanColumn.signature: class KanbanColumn(SQLModel): id, project_id, title, position

KanbanCard.signature: class KanbanCard(SQLModel): id, column_id, title, description, position, created_at

Note.signature: class Note(SQLModel): id, project_id, title, content, created_at, updated_at

kanban_endpoints.description: Full CRUD for kanban columns and cards with drag-drop reordering

notes_endpoints.description: Full CRUD for markdown notes with content storage

optimistic_updates.description: Kanban drag-drop uses optimistic updates with rollback on server error

autosave.description: Markdown editor autosaves after 2 seconds of inactivity, debounced

sync_on_write.description: Every kanban or note mutation triggers SyncEngine.sync_to_disk() to persist to .rapid-web/

portable_format.description: .rapid-web/ files are plain JSON (kanban) and .md (notes) so they can be version-controlled

definition.scope: Two interactive features with their own data models: Kanban Board with drag-and-drop (dnd-kit) and Markdown Note Editor (CodeMirror 6). Both are project-scoped with dedicated SQLite tables, API endpoints, and .rapid-web/ sync.

tasks.description: Define KanbanColumn, KanbanCard, and Note SQLModels with Alembic migrations
tasks.acceptance: Tables created with correct foreign keys and indexes

tasks.description: Implement kanban CRUD endpoints with position-based reordering
tasks.acceptance: Cards can be created, moved between columns, reordered, and deleted
Notes can be created, read, updated, and deleted with full content

tasks.description: Build KanbanBoard component with dnd-kit drag-and-drop
tasks.acceptance: Cards drag between columns with smooth animation
Editor renders markdown with syntax highlighting and autosave

tasks.description: Wire .rapid-web/ sync for kanban and notes data

acceptance: Kanban board supports full CRUD with drag-and-drop reordering
Note editor provides CodeMirror 6 editing with autosave
All data syncs to .rapid-web/ on mutation
Data survives database rebuild from .rapid-web/ files
